scenario: DRIFT-198-I003-002 — evidence recorded for digest A must NOT be injected (fully OR partially) into a review of digest B; and (correction 6) the ENVELOPE digest AND every EMBEDDED suite/run digest must equal the review digest — an envelope claiming digest X that embeds a run stamped digest Y is a surfaced mismatch, never injected.
note: Envelope = the record's top-level reviewed_digest_tree_id; embedded = each T018 runs[].reviewed_digest_tree_id (and each T015 suites[] entry, which inherits the envelope). Contract predicate under test is PURE digest identity; no runtime path is exercised. Digests below are illustrative fixed strings.

cases.name: exact-digest-injection-allowed
cases.why: envelope AND every embedded run digest equal the review digest — the ONLY injectable case.

cases.name: full-envelope-mismatch-refused
cases.why: the envelope digest (A) does not equal the reviewed digest (B); the A-record is not injected.

cases.name: partial-subset-into-other-digest-surfaced
cases.why: even a SUBSET of the A-record injected for a B review is a mismatch, surfaced honestly — never clean, never proof the A-runs did not occur.

cases.name: envelope-matches-but-embedded-run-digest-differs
cases.why: correction 6: the envelope matches the review digest, but an EMBEDDED run is stamped a different digest (B) — a smuggled cross-digest run; not injected.

cases.name: empty-digest-fails-closed
cases.why: an empty digest never matches — fail-closed, never treated as a trivial match.
